hero.headline: Fence posts that *stay put* — panels that last

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From fence posts to custom panels
services_section.subheading: Parts in stock, installation done right

services.title: Fence Installation
services.description: Every post level, every panel secure. Cedar, vinyl, chain link — installed to last.

services.title: Custom Fence Panels
services.description: Built to your specs. Cedar panels cut and crafted for your exact dimensions.

services.title: Fence Parts & Materials
services.description: Hard-to-find parts in stock. Posts, panels, hardware — we've got what others don't carry.

services.title: Fence Repair
services.description: Fallen panels, loose posts, gate problems — we fix what's broken.

about.heading: Fence parts others can't find
about.body: We're the Trenton fence team with the inventory and know-how to get your project done. Real people, real parts, real installation.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Trenton says about our work

reviews.name: Jay A.
reviews.text: Mr. B is a gentleman and businessman. Bought custom cedar panels from him, paid too much by accident, and he gave us back the difference without any hassle.

reviews.name: Ed S.
reviews.text: Not a fancy showroom, but they had parts no one else in the region could supply. Kenny was especially helpful.

reviews.name: Bryce D.
reviews.text: On time, dependable, really nice work. Would definitely use them again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Trenton and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quality fence installation throughout Central New Jersey

cta.heading: Ready to fence it right?
cta.body: Get your free estimate from Trenton's fence team with the parts and skills to do the job right.
